s1.ptxt: Remove battery, battery tray and battery bracket with ECM.
Move gear shift control lever (1) in neutral position of 5th – 6th gear side.
Hold gear shift control lever (1) using gear shift control lever holding pin (2).

attention3.ptxt: Use the following pin for gear shift control lever holding pin.

s1.ptxt: Insert special tool between shift cable lever (1) and guide case (2).
Shift gear shift control lever to 5th or 6th position.
Release lock plate (1) which restricts moving of cable end holder (2).
Push out cable end holder from adjuster (4) using appropriate tool (3) to disengage cable.
Apply grease to pin (5) of gear shift control lever, and then install adjuster (1) into pin of gear shift control lever securely.
Push cable end holder (2) in the direction of [a].

attention3.ptxt: At this time, do not apply force to adjuster and cable end in the direction of [b].

s1.ptxt: Slide lock plate (3) in the direction of [c], until it is locked with the claw (4) of cable end holder.
Remove special tool from between shift cable lever and guide case.
Remove gear shift control lever holding pin from gear shift control lever assembly.
Install battery bracket with ECM, battery tray and battery.
